providers.description:
## What it does

SunPump Agent Token Launch API lets agents, scripts, and applications pay with x402 and submit token launch metadata to SunPump. The gateway forwards the caller's JSON payload to the SunPump launch endpoint after payment settlement.

## Best for

- Agent workflows that need to create a meme or agent token from structured metadata.
- Operator tools that want one paid API call for token creation.
- Testnet and mainnet payment flows across TRON and BSC while using the same SunPump launch request shape.

## Request shape

POST a JSON body with `name`, `symbol`, `description`, `imageBase64`, `twitterUrl`, `telegramUrl`, `websiteUrl`, and `tweetUsername`. Keep `name` within 1-20 characters and use a unique symbol. `imageBase64` may include a base64-encoded token image; if it is empty or omitted, SunPump generates an image automatically.

## Code usage

Use `x402-cli pay` against the route for the payment chain you want. For TRON Nile testnet:

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/sunpump-token-launch-tron-nile/pump-api/ai/agentTokenLaunch' \
  --method POST \
  --network tron:nile \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.001 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --body '{"name":"X402NileA","symbol":"X4A17","description":"x402 launch test","imageBase64":"","twitterUrl":"","telegramUrl":"","websiteUrl":"","tweetUsername":""}'
```

Other routes use the same JSON body: TRON Mainnet uses `sunpump-token-launch-tron` with `tron:mainnet`; BSC Testnet uses `sunpump-token-launch-bsc-testnet` with `eip155:97`; BSC Mainnet uses `sunpump-token-launch-bsc` with `eip155:56`.

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

SunPump Agent 发币 API 允许 Agent、脚本和应用先完成 x402 支付，再把发币元数据提交给 SunPump。Gateway 在支付结算后把调用方的 JSON 请求体转发到 SunPump 发币接口。

## 适合场景

- 需要基于结构化元数据创建 meme token 或 agent token 的 Agent 工作流。
- 希望用一次付费 API 调用完成发币的运营工具。
- 在 TRON 和 BSC 的测试网、主网上使用同一套 SunPump 发币请求格式验证支付流程。

## 请求格式

POST JSON 请求体包含 `name`、`symbol`、`description`、`imageBase64`、`twitterUrl`、`telegramUrl`、`websiteUrl` 和 `tweetUsername`。`name` 需要保持在 1-20 个字符内，并使用唯一 symbol。`imageBase64` 可以传入 base64 编码的 token 图片；如果为空或不传，SunPump 会自动生成图片。

## 代码用法

使用 `x402-cli pay` 调用目标支付链对应的路由。TRON Nile 测试网示例：

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/sunpump-token-launch-tron-nile/pump-api/ai/agentTokenLaunch' \
  --method POST \
  --network tron:nile \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.001 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --body '{"name":"X402NileA","symbol":"X4A17","description":"x402 launch test","imageBase64":"","twitterUrl":"","telegramUrl":"","websiteUrl":"","tweetUsername":""}'
```

其他路由使用同一套 JSON 请求体：TRON 主网使用 `sunpump-token-launch-tron` 和 `tron:mainnet`；BSC 测试网使用 `sunpump-token-launch-bsc-testnet` 和 `eip155:97`；BSC 主网使用 `sunpump-token-launch-bsc` 和 `eip155:56`。
zh-CN.subtitle: 通过 x402 付费调用 SunPump 发币接口
zh-CN.title: SunPump Agent 发币 API
zh-CN.useCase: 适合应用、Agent 或 CLI 流程在 x402 支付成功后调用 SunPump 发币接口。根据支付链选择 TRON Nile、TRON 主网、BSC 测试网或 BSC 主网路由。

providers.sub_title: Paid agent token creation through SunPump
providers.subtitle: Paid agent token creation through SunPump
providers.title: SunPump Agent Token Launch API
providers.use_case: Use this provider when an app, agent, or CLI workflow needs to launch a SunPump token after a successful x402 payment. Choose the route matching the intended payment chain: TRON Nile, TRON Mainnet, BSC Testnet, or BSC Mainnet.

providers.description: x402 passthrough for DefiLlama key-free token prices: current, historical, charts and % change across chains by contract address. Manipulation-resistant cross-check price source for agents. Data by DefiLlama.

zh-CN.description: DefiLlama 数据 API（BNB Chain） 通过 x402 gateway 提供公开数据访问，适合 Agent 在金融分析、交易研究、风险筛查和数据聚合流程中调用。
zh-CN.subtitle: Use to get current or historical USD price for one or many tokens by {chain}:{address} (or coingecko:{id}), plus price charts and percent change.
zh-CN.title: DefiLlama 数据 API（BNB Chain）
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。
